Name: Flight Controller
Description: Primary flight control unit based on STM32H753, includes integrated IMU (ICM-20689) and barometer (MS5611) for stable flight and navigation.

Name: Payload Data Acquisition MCU
Description: Microcontroller board based on the ATmega2560, suitable for projects requiring many I/O pins.

Name: Centimeter-Level GPS Module
Description: Provides precise positioning data for autonomous navigation.

Name: Precision Laser Altimeter
Description: LiDAR for accurate terrain following and altitude hold.

Name: Main LiPo Battery
Description: 4S 5000mAh LiPo battery for main power supply.

Name: Motor Front Left
Description: Brushless motor for propeller rotation.

Name: Motor Front Right
Description: Brushless motor for propeller rotation.

Name: Motor Rear Left
Description: Brushless motor for propeller rotation.

Name: Motor Rear Right
Description: Brushless motor for propeller rotation.

Name: ESC Front Left
Description: Electronic Speed Controller for the left brushless DC motor.

Name: ESC Front Right
Description: Electronic Speed Controller for the left brushless DC motor.

Name: ESC Rear Left
Description: Electronic Speed Controller for the left brushless DC motor.

Name: ESC Rear Right
Description: Electronic Speed Controller for the left brushless DC motor.

Name: Telemetry Radio Module
Product Name: Holybro SiK Telemetry Radio V3 (433MHz or 915MHz)

Name: Main Frame Bottom Plate
Product Name: DJI F450 Quadcopter Frame Carbon Fiber Plate
Description: Bottom plate of the quadcopter frame, typically holding the power distribution board and providing mounting points for arms and landing gear.

Name: Main Frame Top Plate
Product Name: DJI F450 Quadcopter Frame Carbon Fiber Plate
Description: Top plate of the quadcopter frame, providing mounting for flight controller, battery, and other electronics.

Name: Frame Arm Front Left
Description: Front left arm of the quadcopter frame, supporting the motor and ESC.

Name: Frame Arm Front Right
Description: Front right arm of the quadcopter frame, supporting the motor and ESC.

Name: Frame Arm Rear Left
Description: Rear left arm of the quadcopter frame, supporting the motor and ESC.

Name: Frame Arm Rear Right
Description: Rear right arm of the quadcopter frame, supporting the motor and ESC.

Name: Landing Skid Set
Description: Standard landing gear skids to provide stable ground clearance for the drone.

Name: Propeller Front Left
Description: Self-tightening plastic propeller for the front left motor, rotating clockwise.

Name: Propeller Front Right
Description: Self-tightening plastic propeller for the front right motor, rotating counter-clockwise.

Name: Propeller Rear Left
Description: Self-tightening plastic propeller for the rear left motor, rotating counter-clockwise.

Name: Propeller Rear Right
Description: Self-tightening plastic propeller for the rear right motor, rotating clockwise.

Name: Collapsible Sensor Boom
Description: Lightweight, non-magnetic carbon fiber telescopic pole, 30-50cm extended, to minimize magnetic interference from the drone.

Name: Boom Retraction Mechanism
Description: 3D-printed mechanism to attach and allow retraction/extension of the sensor boom, operated by a micro servo.

Name: Z-Axis Magnetometer Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the vertical magnetometer, ensuring Z-axis orientation and secure attachment to the sensor boom.

Name: X-Axis Magnetometer Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the horizontal magnetometer, ensuring X-axis orientation and secure attachment to the sensor boom, next to the Z-axis mag.

Name: Laser Altimeter Mount
Description: 3D-printed bracket to securely attach the laser altimeter to the sensor boom, ensuring an unobstructed downward view.

Name: Flight Controller Mount
Description: Vibration-dampening mount for the Pixhawk flight controller, isolating it from frame vibrations for better IMU performance.

Name: Payload MCU Mount
Description: 3D-printed tray or standoffs to mount the Arduino Mega payload microcontroller securely on the frame's top plate.

Name: GNSS Module Mast
Description: Tall 3D-printed mast for elevating the GNSS module above the main frame to improve signal reception.

Name: GNSS Module Top Mount
Description: Small 3D-printed platform to mount the GNSS module securely on top of the GNSS mast.

Name: Telemetry Radio Mount
Description: 3D-printed enclosure or bracket for the telemetry radio module, typically mounted on a frame arm or side.

Name: LiPo Battery Strap
Description: Velcro strap for securing the main LiPo battery to the drone's top plate.

Name: M3 Nylon Standoff
Description: Nylon standoffs used for mounting PCBs and components to avoid short circuits and provide spacing.

Name: M3 Nylon Screw
Description: Nylon screws used with standoffs for mounting components, non-magnetic.

Name: M3 Nylon Nut
Description: Nylon nuts for securing nylon screws and standoffs, non-magnetic.

Name: Cable Ties
Description: Assorted small plastic cable ties for wire management and securing lightweight components.

Name: ESC Front Left Mount
Description: Per-position bracket for the ESC Front Left with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.

Name: ESC Front Right Mount
Description: Per-position bracket for the ESC Front Right with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.

Name: ESC Rear Left Mount
Description: Per-position bracket for the ESC Rear Left with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.

Name: ESC Rear Right Mount
Description: Per-position bracket for the ESC Rear Right with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.
